name: Vegetarian"sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500°F.
2. Press the beans through a colander.
3. Add spices.
4. Shape mixture into patties.
5. Combine egg and milk.
6. Dip patties into egg, then into cornmeal.
7. Place in well oiled roasting pan.
8. Bake until sausages are browned on all sides, turning during cooking.
